{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Front Desk Officer",
  "description": "Kursi Group Limited is one of Nigeria&rsquo;s leading diversified conglomerates, recognized for responsible resource management, ethical business practices, and operational excellence. Headquartered in Abuja and duly incorporated with theNigeria Corporate Affairs Commission, the Group operates across mining, mineral processing, jewellery manufacturing, engineering, technology, agriculture, finance, and international trade, with major operational footprints in Kwara and Plateau States.

Driven by a vision to create sustainable economic value through innovation and responsible enterprise, the Group has established an integrated value chain that transforms Nigeria&rsquo;s natural resources into globally competitive products and services. Through its subsidiaries, Kursi Group combines local expertise, advanced technology, and international best practices to support industrial growth, job creation, and community development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Front Desk Officer serves as the first point of contact for visitors, clients, and staff.
	This role ensures professional front desk operations, courteous and efficient service, accurate handling of inquiries, proper visitor management, and smooth daily office operations.
	The role also supports administrative functions to facilitate operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and receive all visitors professionally, issuing visitor identification and ensuring proper access.
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and correspondence, directing them to the appropriate departments or personnel.
	Respond to inquiries accurately and escalate issues when necessary.
	Maintain detailed visitor logs and submit regular reports to the supervisor.
	Schedule appointments and provide support to internal teams.
	Maintain the reception area and common spaces in a clean, organized, and professional manner.
	Coordinate with security and other departments to ensure smooth front office operations.
	Support administrative tasks as needed to ensure operational efficiency.


Qualifications and Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Public Administration, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years&rsquo; experience in a customer-facing, administrative, or front office role.
	Strong interpersonal, written, and verbal communication skills.
	Excellent organizational, multitasking, and time-management abilities.
	Professional and friendly demeanor with strong customer service orientation.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) and general office systems.
	Ability to handle stress, remain calm under pressure, and prioritize tasks effectively.
	Demonstrated teamwork, collaboration, and reliability.


Disclaimer


	Due to the urgency of this position, applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis, and the position may be filled before the recruitment closing date.


Guiding Principles:


	Kursi Group has zero tolerance for sexual harassment, exploitation and abuse, human trafficking, child abuse, and exploitation.
	Any violations of these principles and policies will be treated as serious misconduct.
	Kursi Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer.
	All qualified candidates are encouraged to apply.
",

Front Desk Officer Job at Kursi Group Limited




        
    

        
        Kursi Group Limited is one of Nigeria’s leading diversified conglomerates, recognized for responsible resource management, ethical business practices, and operational excellence. Headquartered in Abuja and duly incorporated with theNigeria Corporate Affairs Commission, the Group operates across mining, mineral processing, jewellery manufacturing, engineering, technology, agriculture, finance, and international trade, with major operational footprints in Kwara and Plateau States.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Driven by a vision to create sustainable economic value through innovation and responsible enterprise, the Group has established an integrated value chain that transforms Nigeria’s natural resources into globally competitive products and services. Through its subsidiaries, Kursi Group combines local expertise, advanced technology, and international best practices to support industrial growth, job creation, and community development.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Front Desk Officer serves as the first point of contact for visitors, clients, and staff.
	This role ensures professional front desk operations, courteous and efficient service, accurate handling of inquiries, proper visitor management, and smooth daily office operations.
	The role also supports administrative functions to facilitate operational efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and receive all visitors professionally, issuing visitor identification and ensuring proper access.
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and correspondence, directing them to the appropriate departments or personnel.
	Respond to inquiries accurately and escalate issues when necessary.
	Maintain detailed visitor logs and submit regular reports to the supervisor.
	Schedule appointments and provide support to internal teams.
	Maintain the reception area and common spaces in a clean, organized, and professional manner.
	Coordinate with security and other departments to ensure smooth front office operations.
	Support administrative tasks as needed to ensure operational efficiency.


Qualifications and Skills


	Bachelor’s Degree in Public Administration, Business Administration, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years’ experience in a customer-facing, administrative, or front office role.
	Strong interpersonal, written, and verbal communication skills.
	Excellent organizational, multitasking, and time-management abilities.
	Professional and friendly demeanor with strong customer service orientation.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) and general office systems.
	Ability to handle stress, remain calm under pressure, and prioritize tasks effectively.
	Demonstrated teamwork, collaboration, and reliability.


Disclaimer


	Due to the urgency of this position, applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis, and the position may be filled before the recruitment closing date.


Guiding Principles:


	Kursi Group has zero tolerance for sexual harassment, exploitation and abuse, human trafficking, child abuse, and exploitation.
	Any violations of these principles and policies will be treated as serious misconduct.
	Kursi Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer.
	All qualified candidates are encouraged to apply.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Account Personnel (Tickets & Email Support)",
  "description": "Tizeti provides high speed broadband internet to Residences, businesses, Events, Conferences and deploys public Wi-fi Hotspot at locations across Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Personnel (Tickets &amp; Email Support)
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	Account Personnel to manage customer tickets and respond to emails promptly. You&rsquo;ll be the first point of contact for client inquiries, ensuring issues are resolved quickly and professionally.


Key Responsibilities


	Ticket Management: Log, track, and resolve customer tickets using our support system.
	Prioritize and escalate unresolved issues to the right team.
	Email Response: Respond to all customer/account emails within SLA. Provide clear, accurate, and courteous replies.Issue
	Resolution: Investigate complaints, payment issues, and account queries. Follow up until closure.
	Documentation: Keep records of all interactions and update customer account notes.
	Coordination: Liaise with finance, tech, and operations teams to resolve cross-functional issues.
	Reporting: Prepare weekly reports on ticket volume, resolution time, and recurring issues.3.


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc in Accounting, Business Admin, or related field 1-2 years of experience in customer support, account management, or helpdesk Strong written communication + email etiquette Good Excel / Google Sheets skills
	Problem-solving mindset and attention to detail. Professional email writing, active listening, CRM/ticketing tools, follow-up discipline, promptness.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and BSc certificate to: careers@tizeti.com using &quot;Application for Account Personnel&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Account Personnel (Tickets & Email Support) Job at Tizeti Network Limited




        
    

        
        Tizeti provides high speed broadband internet to Residences, businesses, Events, Conferences and deploys public Wi-fi Hotspot at locations across Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Personnel (Tickets & Email Support)
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	Account Personnel to manage customer tickets and respond to emails promptly. You’ll be the first point of contact for client inquiries, ensuring issues are resolved quickly and professionally.


Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ticket Management: Log, track, and resolve customer tickets using our support system.
	Prioritize and escalate unresolved issues to the right team.
	Email Response: Respond to all customer/account emails within SLA. Provide clear, accurate, and courteous replies.Issue
	Resolution: Investigate complaints, payment issues, and account queries. Follow up until closure.
	Documentation: Keep records of all interactions and update customer account notes.
	Coordination: Liaise with finance, tech, and operations teams to resolve cross-functional issues.
	Reporting: Prepare weekly reports on ticket volume, resolution time, and recurring issues.3.


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc in Accounting, Business Admin, or related field 1-2 years of experience in customer support, account management, or helpdesk Strong written communication + email etiquette Good Excel / Google Sheets skills
	Problem-solving mindset and attention to detail. Professional email writing, active listening, CRM/ticketing tools, follow-up discipline, promptness.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and BSc certificate to: [email protected] using "Application for Account Personnel" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Creative Director – Media Productions & Content Strategy",
  "description": "At Thelix Holdings, our mission is to drive transformative change across diverse industries by strategically investing in education, healthcare, financial services, and tourism. We are dedicated to creating long-term value for our stakeholders by ensuring innovation, promoting sustainable growth, and empowering communities globally through impactful programs and cutting-edge solutions.


We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Creative Director &ndash; Media Productions &amp; Content Strategy

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)



About the Role


	As part of our growth and brand expansion strategy, we are building a modern media and content ecosystem designed to position our subsidiaries as category leaders while driving audience growth, brand authority, customer acquisition, and revenue influence through high-impact media productions.
	Our media initiatives currently include:
	
		Livestream productions for CreditVeto Africa
		Viral short-form content systems
		Long-form educational and brand storytelling content
		Audience led digital campaigns.
		Podcasts for:
		
			ExcelMind
			CreditVeto Africa
			VeriPass
			Viza Check.
		
		
	
	
	We are seeking a highly creative, commercially aware, internet native Creative Director capable of transforming media assets into scalable growth and lead-generation engines.


Position and Role Overview


	The Creative Director is a strategic leadership role responsible for overseeing the creative vision, production quality, storytelling systems, audience engagement strategy, and growth performance of all media productions across Thelix Holdings and its subsidiaries.
	This role will involve managing high-profile media projects including podcast productions for:
	
		ExcelMind
		CreditVeto Africa
		VeriPass
		Viza Check
	
	
	as well as livestream productions for CreditVeto Africa and future media initiatives across the organization.
	The ideal candidate must deeply understand modern internet culture, audience psychology, viral media systems, content-led growth, and digital storytelling.
	This role requires close collaboration with Growth, Brand &amp; Communications, Product, Sales, Operations, and Leadership teams to ensure media productions align with business objectives, customer acquisition goals, and company growth targets.


Job Objective
The primary objective of this role is to design and execute media programs capable of:


	Making company media assets go viral.
	Creating strong organic buzz and audience engagement.
	Driving inbound customer interest.
	Generating high volumes of organic leads.
	Building brand authority and market relevance.
	Positioning Thelix Holdings subsidiaries as highly visible digital-first brands.


Core Responsibilities
The role shall oversee and manage media production and creative functions across the organization, including but not limited to:
Creative Strategy &amp; Media Direction:


	Develop and execute a unified media and creative strategy across all Thelix Holdings subsidiaries.
	Lead the creative vision and production direction for podcasts, livestreams, branded content, interviews, campaigns, and digital storytelling initiatives.
	Build creative systems that increase:
	
		Organic reach
		Audience retention
		Shareability
		Brand engagement
		Community participation
		Lead generation
		Viral distribution potential.
	
	
	Ensure all media productions maintain high creative, storytelling, and production standards.


Podcast &amp; Livestream Management:


	Oversee podcast recording productions for:
	
		ExcelMind
		CreditVeto Africa
		VeriPass
		Viza Check
	
	
	Design podcast structures, storytelling formats, guest experiences, audience hooks, and recurring engagement systems.
	Lead creative planning and execution for livestream productions for CreditVeto Africa.
	Develop audience interaction frameworks for live productions and community participation.


Viral Content &amp; Audience Growth:


	Design media programs and content systems intentionally optimized for virality and organic audience growth.
	Develop content strategies capable of generating:
	
		Organic buzz
		Online conversations
		Community engagement
		High audience retention
		Social sharing
		Inbound lead generation
	
	
	Create systems for converting long-form media into high-performing short-form content across digital platforms.
	Continuously study internet culture, digital trends, audience psychology, and platform behavior to improve content performance.


Production Oversight &amp; Execution:


	Oversee video production quality, editing direction, creative consistency, and visual storytelling standards.
	Collaborate with editors, designers, videographers, producers, and content teams to ensure timely and high-quality delivery of media assets.
	Build scalable production workflows and operational systems for media execution.
	Ensure consistency in branding, tone, messaging, and creative identity across all productions.


Brand Visibility &amp; Market Authority:


	Position Thelix Holdings and its subsidiaries as recognizable and authoritative brands within their industries.
	Increase digital visibility and audience growth across:
	
		YouTube
		Instagram
		TikTok
		X / Twitter
		LinkedIn
		Podcast platforms
		Emerging digital media channels.
	
	
	Build media strategies that directly support customer acquisition and revenue growth.


Innovation &amp; Performance Optimization:


	Monitor media performance metrics and optimize content strategies based on engagement, audience behavior, and conversion insights.
	Introduce innovative storytelling formats, audience experiences, and digital media trends into company productions.
	Utilize AI tools and modern creative technologies to improve production efficiency and content performance.


Success in This Role Looks Like


	Company media productions achieve significant audience growth and engagement.
	Podcasts and livestreams generate consistent organic leads.
	Media assets become highly shareable and culturally relevant.
	Thelix Holdings subsidiaries strengthen market authority and digital visibility.
	Viral content systems become repeatable and scalable.
	Media productions contribute directly to customer acquisition and brand growth.


Requirements


	5+ years of experience as a Creative Director, Media Director, Executive Producer, Content Strategist, or Digital Media Lead.
	Strong understanding of viral media systems and audience psychology.
	Experience leading podcasts, livestreams, or large-scale digital media productions.
	Strong storytelling and brand-building capabilities.
	Experience creating content systems that drive audience growth and customer acquisition.
	Deep understanding of modern social media platforms and organic growth mechanics.
	Ability to lead creative teams and manage high-volume content operations.


Skills:


	Creative Direction
	Media Production Strategy
	Storytelling &amp; Narrative Development
	Viral Content Strategy
	Podcast &amp; Livestream Production
	Audience Growth &amp; Engagement
	Internet Culture &amp; Trend Analysis
	Social Media Growth
	Video Production Oversight
	Brand Building
	Creative Campaign Development
	AI-Assisted Content Systems
	Leadership &amp; Team Collaboration
	Performance Analytics &amp; Optimization

We are dedicated to creating long-term value for our stakeholders by ensuring innovation, promoting sustainable growth, and empowering communities globally through impactful programs and cutting-edge solutions.

  "description": "Trident Micro Finance Bank Limited is a financial Institution incorporated to provide financial services to those person(s) or business (es) that are traditionally not served or under-served by the conventional commercial banks. Trident MFB are also positioned to meet the needs of these emerging businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Controller (FINCON)

Job Location: Central Business District, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Financial Controller to join our finance team in a reputable financial institution, successful candidate will.


	Manage and reconcile financial transactions and accounts
	Prepare and review financial reports and statements
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements
	Analyze financial data and provide recommendations
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive business decisions


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting or related field with a minimum 4 years of experience in accounting or finance
	Professional certification (ACCA, ICAN, etc.) is an advantage
	Strong analytical, communication, and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in financial software and Microsoft Office.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter and Curriculum Vitae (CV) in PDF or MS Word format to: hrrecruitment@tridentmfb.com using &quot;Financial Controller&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Financial Controller (FINCON) Job at Trident Micro Finance Bank Limited




        
    

        
        Trident Micro Finance Bank Limited is a financial Institution incorporated to provide financial services to those person(s) or business (es) that are traditionally not served or under-served by the conventional commercial banks. Trident MFB are also positioned to meet the needs of these emerging businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Controller (FINCON)

Job Location: Central Business District, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Financial Controller to join our finance team in a reputable financial institution, successful candidate will.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage and reconcile financial transactions and accounts
	Prepare and review financial reports and statements
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements
	Analyze financial data and provide recommendations
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive business decisions


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting or related field with a minimum 4 years of experience in accounting or finance
	Professional certification (ACCA, ICAN, etc.) is an advantage
	Strong analytical, communication, and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in financial software and Microsoft Office.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter and Curriculum Vitae (CV) in PDF or MS Word format to: [email protected] using "Financial Controller" as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Assistant",
  "description": "eHealth4everyone is a digital health enterprise based in Nigeria (Africa) contributing to health service delivery using data science and information technology. At ehealth4everyone, our goal is saving lives and our approach is information and technology. We believe that if health is a right, proven digital health solutions and expertise such as ours should not be a privilege.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant

Job Location: Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for an organized and self-motivated Office Administrator who will be responsible for providing administrative support to our office personnel.
	The office administrator&rsquo;s role will include working closely with all teams by handling clerical duties, asset/inventory management, vendor engagement, procurement, support staff management as well as front desk management.
	In order to be successful in this position you should be detail-oriented, professional and have excellent written and verbal communication skills.


Responsibilities


	Customer service role.
	Front desk management.
	Carrying out other clerical duties such as preparing documents, including office correspondence, memos, resumes, and presentations.
	Performing bookkeeping tasks such as invoicing.
	Maintaining general office files, including vendor files, and other files related to the company&rsquo;s operations.
	Support staff supervision.
	Purchasing office supplies, equipment, and furniture.
	Overseeing the maintenance of office facilities, and equipment.
	Event planning.
	Has some experience in supervising a building project.
	Performing other relevant duties when needed.


Qualification and Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, management or related field.
	Minimum of three (3) years of experience in a related role.
	Legal Background
	Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks.
	Negotiation skills.
	People/project management.
	Attention to details.

Administrative Assistant Job at eHealth4everyone




        
    

        
        eHealth4everyone is a digital health enterprise based in Nigeria (Africa) contributing to health service delivery using data science and information technology. At ehealth4everyone, our goal is saving lives and our approach is information and technology. We believe that if health is a right, proven digital health solutions and expertise such as ours should not be a privilege.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant

Job Location: Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an organized and self-motivated Office Administrator who will be responsible for providing administrative support to our office personnel.
	The office administrator’s role will include working closely with all teams by handling clerical duties, asset/inventory management, vendor engagement, procurement, support staff management as well as front desk management.
	In order to be successful in this position you should be detail-oriented, professional and have excellent written and verbal communication skills.


Responsibilities


	Customer service role.
	Front desk management.
	Carrying out other clerical duties such as preparing documents, including office correspondence, memos, resumes, and presentations.
	Performing bookkeeping tasks such as invoicing.
	Maintaining general office files, including vendor files, and other files related to the company’s operations.
	Support staff supervision.
	Purchasing office supplies, equipment, and furniture.
	Overseeing the maintenance of office facilities, and equipment.
	Event planning.
	Has some experience in supervising a building project.
	Performing other relevant duties when needed.


Qualification and Skills


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, management or related field.
	Minimum of three (3) years of experience in a related role.
	Legal Background
	Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks.
	Negotiation skills.
	People/project management.
	Attention to details.
